name: WorkspaceInfo
summary: Contains sufficient data to create a Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceModel object

constructors.name: WorkspaceInfo()
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceInfo class with default workspace data.

constructors.name: WorkspaceInfo(string, string, string, Dynamo.Models.RunType)
constructors.signature: void WorkspaceInfo(string id, string name, string description, Dynamo.Models.RunType runType)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the Dynamo.Graph.Workspaces.WorkspaceInfo class with default workspace data.

properties.name: Category
properties.summary: Returns full category name of custom node

properties.name: FileName
properties.summary: Returns file name of the workspace

properties.name: HasRunWithoutCrash
properties.summary: Indicates if the workspace was executed successfully at last time

properties.name: ID
properties.summary: Returns System.Guid identifier string value of custom node workspace

properties.name: IsCustomNodeWorkspace
properties.summary: Indicates whether the workspace is custom node or home workspace

properties.name: IsVisibleInDynamoLibrary
properties.summary: Indicates if the custom node is visible node library

properties.name: RunPeriod
properties.summary: Returns run period value of the home workspace if RunType is Periodic

properties.name: RunType
properties.summary: Returns run type of the home workspace

properties.name: ScaleFactor
properties.summary: Returns the scale factor for ProtoGeometry geometries

properties.name: Version
properties.summary: Returns version of Dynamo where the workspace was created

properties.name: X
properties.summary: Returns X coordinate of top left corner of visible workspace part

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Returns Y coordinate of top left corner of visible workspace part

properties.name: Zoom
properties.summary: Returns zoom value of the workspace
